_description: Weekly check-in entries for Scale path. Append only — one entry per Monday (or L10™ day). Lightweight observation, no KPI recompute. Subphase-aware: 3.1 = CAC-Burn watch + Lead-Supply, 3.2 = L10™-Mode toggle (Scorecard + IDS™ items), 3.3 = Country-Funnel, 3.4 = Vector-Health + NDR. Alarming signals flagged in 'flags' array trigger event-* operations on next session via path_state.events_pending.

answers.q6_step_specific: [PLACEHOLDER — 3.1: CAC-Burn + Lead-Mix · 3.2: L10™-Rating + IDS™ items · 3.3: Country-Funnel state · 3.4: Vector-Pre-Sell / NDR drift]

note: Example row — delete on first real check-in.
